# seerr_notification_lunasea (Resource)

Manage Seerr lunasea notification settings via /api/v1/settings/notifications/lunasea.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `embed_poster` (Boolean)
- `enabled` (Boolean)
- `lunasea` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--lunasea))
- `notification_types` (Set of String) Set of notification event types. Valid values include `MEDIA_PENDING`, `MEDIA_APPROVED`, `MEDIA_AVAILABLE`, `MEDIA_FAILED`, `MEDIA_DECLINED`, `MEDIA_AUTO_APPROVED`, `ISSUE_CREATED`, `ISSUE_COMMENT`, `ISSUE_RESOLVED`, `ISSUE_REOPENED`, `MEDIA_AUTO_REQUESTED`.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.

<a id="nestedatt--lunasea"></a>
### Nested Schema for `lunasea`

Required:

- `webhook_url` (String)

Optional:

- `profile_name` (String)

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
# In Terraform 1.5.0 and later, use an import block to import seerr_notification_lunasea. For example:
#
# import {
#   to = seerr_notification_lunasea.example
#   id = "lunasea"
# }

# Otherwise, use the terraform import command:
terraform import seerr_notification_lunasea.example lunasea
```
